description: Urgent re-review queue for the curmudgeon. Items here jump ALL normal cycle work (Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 3). Default: one item per curmudgeon run — guaranteed fresh context, no batch contamination. As of 2026-04-25, curmudgeon may batch up to 3 items in a single run if all qualifying items are minor re-reviews (decider classified all triggering patches severity:minor, no verdict change, combined patch diff <10KB, target reviewed within last 3 cycles, not a fresh onboard) — see curmudgeon.md Step 8a. Throughput is managed by mode flag + decider scheduler mutation.

mode_rules.bau: Curmudgeon runs on normal 4h schedule. Priority queue is still honored — curmudgeon pops one item per run, but items drain at the normal cadence.
mode_rules.churn-and-burn: Decider, at end of every run, checks queue depth. If queue.length > 0, decider bumps curmudgeon schedule to every 30 min via update_scheduled_task. When queue empties, decider restores curmudgeon to every 4h AND auto-flips mode back to 'bau' (so a forgotten churn-and-burn can't leave curmudgeon pinned fast).

queue.reason: EXP-298 defense neutralization integrated — WIN-028 evidence substantially rewritten (683 words vs 267). New arguments: kernel-of-truth ack, arc-calc, unfalsifiability pivot, dome-threshold anchoring. Fresh attack needed.
4 patches applied from c4 review (1 moderate: falloff-law burden sentence; 3 minor: declination range, Doodson count hedge, opening sentence). Verification pass needed.

schedule_state.note: Churn-and-burn: dome author reactive update detected 2026-04-17. Canary soft-triggered. 5 change files pending analysis. Analyst/curmudgeon 30m, decider 1h.
schedule_state.analyst_override_clear_when: all 5 chg-20260417 change files processed and curmudgeon has reviewed analyst output
